title: Firework Rocket Colors
description: An Optifine/CIT pack that adds variations to firework rockets, depending on their flight duration and whether they have explosions or not. Updated for compatibility with Minecraft 1.20.5 due to NBT changes.
body:
### An Optifine/CIT pack that adds variations to firework rockets, depending on their flight duration and whether they have explosions or not.

**Updated for compatibility with Minecraft 1.20.5 and beyond, due to changes with the NBT data system.**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AsVQBClb/images/191581f590b47eb03c986bf4a71af8d7a19c48dd.png)

Rockets with explosions will use the vanilla texture, while rockets without explosions will appear without the vanilla red stripes and instead have a progress bar indicating the flight duration. Rockets without explosions and with a flight duration of 2 or 3 will be colored yellow or green. Rockets without NBT data (from creative inventory or commands) will appear without stripes and without number.

_Original pack made by [Legofelix55 on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/firework-rocket-colors/). Updated with permission from the original creator._

Want to use the pack in versions older than 1.20.5? Just use the [original pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/firework-rocket-colors/).
